# PRVS Dashboard v1.294
**Released:** 2026-03-27

## What's New

### GH#15 — Virtual Lot Map Phase 2 Complete
This release wraps up Phase 2 of the Virtual Lot Map project, completing the QR code workflow from print to scan.

#### 🖨️ Dual-Sticker QR Print Sheet (v1.293)
Clicking **🖨️ Print Label** on any RO card now opens a print-ready page with two cut-and-use stickers:
- **3" × 3" Windshield Sticker** — large QR code, customer name, RV make, RO number, and yellow 📍 parking spot chip (if assigned). Goes on the RV windshield.
- **1" × 1" Key Tag** — compact QR code + RO number. Goes on the key ring.

Both stickers include dashed cut borders and physical inch sizing so they print correctly on any printer. A **🖨️ Print Sheet** button is on-screen but hidden when printing.

#### 📲 QR Scan → RO Tile Deep Link (v1.294)
QR codes now open the **main dashboard** instead of the Tech Check In page. When scanned:
1. The dashboard loads and automatically finds the matching RO
2. The page scrolls to the tile and pulses a **blue highlight ring 3×** so it's immediately obvious which RV it is
3. Anyone can see full RO details — status, photos, parts, notes
4. Techs can tap **🚪 Tech Check In** directly from the tile

The 🚪 Tech Check In button still goes directly to `checkin.html` — that workflow is unchanged.

---

## Summary of Changes
| Version | Change |
|---|---|
| v1.293 | Dual-sticker QR print sheet — 3"×3" windshield + 1"×1" key tag |
| v1.294 | QR scan opens main dashboard RO tile with blue deep-link highlight |

---

## No Database Changes
No SQL migrations required for this release.
